entities.name: V
entities.context: Vrijen — owner of the knowledge system being described

entities.name: Operators
entities.context: Referenced in compaction pattern '[X] operators confirm: [Pattern]'

entities.name: Aggregated Insights
entities.context: Core knowledge artifact (aggregated_insights.md) that gets updated with new insights

entities.name: Signal Strength Levels
entities.context: Framework for categorizing insights by source volume: Strong, Emerging, Single-Source, Contradictions

entities.name: Strong Signals
entities.context: ≥3 primary sources — trigger for immediate action

entities.name: Contradictions
entities.context: Disagreements between primary sources requiring surfacing

entities.name: Source Credibility Weighting
entities.context: Framework for weighting sources by type and quality

entities.name: Primary Source
entities.context: Weight 1.0 — firsthand operational experience on exact topic

entities.name: Compaction Trigger
entities.context: Rule: when 5+ similar insights exist, compact into one consolidated insight with source listings

entities.name: Context Efficiency
entities.context: Design principle: only load existing doc + new B31 (~20k tokens max)

entities.name: LLM
entities.context: Updates the aggregated doc within small context window constraints

relationships.context: Operators confirm patterns that get consolidated into aggregated insights
Strong Signals is a category within the Signal Strength Levels framework
Emerging Signals is a category within the Signal Strength Levels framework
Single-Source is a category within the Signal Strength Levels framework
Contradictions is a category within the Signal Strength Levels framework
Primary Source is the top tier in Source Credibility Weighting (weight 1.0)
Compaction trigger fires when updating aggregated insights with 5+ similar items
V owns and operates this knowledge system workflow
